summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: Nothing's flagging right now — your knees, joints, shoulders, neck, none of your usual watch spots are asking for attention this morning. You're someone who recovers by stacking steady, unspectacular nights rather than swinging high and crashing, and today fits that mold cleanly — you came out of sleep settled and ready. Day's wide open in front of you.

Performance: Push hard. You're sitting above your normal line this morning, so it's a green light to load up — keep your protein climbing alongside it, because going hard on an empty tank is how you burn muscle instead of building it.

Transit: none
